hero.headline: Macon's *go-to crew* for yards that work
hero.subheadline: From overgrown lots to market-ready landscapes — we show up with sharp blades and straight answers.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every blade of grass, every branch
services_section.subheading: From weekly cuts to complete property makeovers

services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Regular cuts, edging, and cleanup to keep your property looking sharp every week.

services.title: Tree Services & Removal
services.description: Safe removal of problem trees and light pruning to open up your space.

services.title: Landscape Design & Install
services.description: Custom designs that fit your budget and transform your property's curb appeal.

services.title: Stone & Hardscape Work
services.description: Fire pits, walkways, and stone cutting for your outdoor projects.

services.title: Property Cleanup
services.description: Complete site cleanup after construction or storm damage.

about.heading: Real crew, real results
about.body: We're the Macon landscape team that answers the phone and shows up when promised. One call handles everything from cutting tall grass to designing market-ready yards.

reviews.name: Ian m.
reviews.text: Needed help cutting stones for my fire pit project. They responded same day with a great price so I could finish before the holidays.

reviews.name: Jimmy M.
reviews.text: Southern Blades delivered as promised — on time and professional. They fell a large tree and did cleanup from their work and the previous contractor. Affordable and trustworthy.

reviews.name: Angelina M.
reviews.text: Delivered exactly what was agreed on for prepping my property before market. Braydon had great design ideas and kept everything within budget. Very satisfied.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Middle Georgia
service_areas.subheading: Professional landscape services throughout the region

cta.heading: Ready to get your yard handled?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and crews that show up when they say they will. Let's talk about your property.
